name: Fern Tips Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Melted butter or salad oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last two in a bowl.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Arrange hard-boiled eggs over top of the chilled, cooked fiddleheads.
4. Pour vinaigrette sauce over all.
